title: E-commerce Website
summary: A full-stack e-commerce platform with user authentication, product catalog, and payment integration.

milestones.name: Milestone 1
milestones.description: Project Initialisation and Setup: Set up the project structure, initialize Git repository, and configure development environment with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

steps.title: Create Project Folder Structure
steps.description: Create the main project directory and subdirectories for frontend and backend code.
steps.verificationSteps: Use `ls` or file explorer to confirm you have: project-root/, project-root/client/, project-root/server/, project-root/.git/
steps.hints: You can create folders using `mkdir` command or right-click in file explorer. Use `git init` to initialize Git.

steps.title: Initialize Node.js Backend
steps.description: Set up Node.js and install Express framework in the server directory.
steps.verificationSteps: Confirm server/package.json exists and node_modules folder is created.
steps.hints: Navigate to server folder and run: npm init -y && npm install express mongoose dotenv cors

steps.title: Create Basic Express Server
steps.description: Create the main server file with Express and configure basic middleware.
steps.verificationSteps: Run `npm run dev` and visit http://localhost:5000/ — you should see 'Server running on port 5000'
steps.hints: Create file: server/index.js. Use dotenv to load .env variables.

steps.title: Initialize React Frontend
steps.description: Create React app in the client directory using Vite.
steps.verificationSteps: Confirm client/package.json exists and node_modules is created. Run `npm run dev` in client folder.
steps.hints: From project root, run: npm create vite@latest client -- --template react && cd client && npm install

steps.title: Set Up MongoDB Connection
steps.description: Create MongoDB connection file and configure Mongoose.
steps.verificationSteps: Check that server starts without connection errors. You should see 'MongoDB connected' in console.
steps.hints: Create server/config/db.js. Make sure MongoDB is running on your machine.

milestones.name: Milestone 2
milestones.description: Project Basic Structure and Layout: Create the basic UI layout, implement routing, and set up the database schema for products and users.

milestones.name: Milestone 3
milestones.description: Adding Core Functionality: Implement user authentication, product catalog display, and basic CRUD operations for products.

milestones.name: Milestone 4
milestones.description: Backend Integration: Develop RESTful APIs for user management, product management, and integrate with the frontend.

milestones.name: Milestone 5
milestones.description: Payment Integration and Deployment: Integrate Stripe for payments, add order management, and deploy the application to a hosting platform.

title: Task Management App
summary: A simple task management application to create, edit, and track tasks with due dates.

milestones.name: Milestone 1
milestones.description: Project Initialisation and Setup: Initialize React project, set up Firebase project, and configure authentication.

milestones.name: Milestone 2
milestones.description: Project Basic Structure and Layout: Design the UI components for task list, task form, and navigation.

milestones.name: Milestone 3
milestones.description: Adding Core Functionality: Implement task creation, editing, deletion, and marking tasks as complete.

milestones.name: Milestone 4
milestones.description: Backend Integration: Integrate with Firebase Firestore for data persistence and real-time updates.

milestones.name: Milestone 5
milestones.description: Additional Features and Deployment: Add due date tracking, notifications, and deploy to Firebase Hosting.

title: Weather Dashboard
summary: A weather dashboard that displays current weather and forecasts using a weather API.

milestones.name: Milestone 1
milestones.description: Project Initialisation and Setup: Set up the HTML structure, CSS styling, and JavaScript file. Obtain API key for weather service.

milestones.name: Milestone 2
milestones.description: Project Basic Structure and Layout: Create the dashboard layout with sections for current weather and forecast.

milestones.name: Milestone 3
milestones.description: API Integration: Implement API calls to fetch current weather and forecast data.

milestones.name: Milestone 4
milestones.description: Data Display and UI Enhancement: Display weather data in a user-friendly format and add responsive design.

milestones.name: Milestone 5
milestones.description: Additional Features: Add location search, weather icons, and deploy to a static hosting service.

title: Blog Platform
summary: A full-featured blog platform with user authentication, post creation, and commenting system.

milestones.name: Milestone 1
milestones.description: Project Initialisation and Setup: Initialize Next.js project, set up database with Prisma and PostgreSQL, configure Auth0 for authentication.

milestones.name: Milestone 2
milestones.description: Project Basic Structure and Layout: Design the blog layout, implement routing, and create database models for users and posts.

milestones.name: Milestone 3
milestones.description: User Authentication: Implement user registration, login, and session management with Auth0.

milestones.name: Milestone 4
milestones.description: Post Management: Add functionality for creating, editing, and deleting blog posts with rich text editor.

milestones.name: Milestone 5
milestones.description: Commenting System and Deployment: Implement commenting on posts, add search and categories, and deploy to Vercel.

title: Portfolio Website
summary: A personal portfolio website to showcase projects, skills, and contact information.

milestones.name: Milestone 1
milestones.description: Project Initialisation and Setup: Set up React project with Vite, install Tailwind CSS, and plan the website structure.

milestones.name: Milestone 2
milestones.description: Project Basic Structure and Layout: Create the main layout with header, navigation, and footer components.

milestones.name: Milestone 3
milestones.description: Content Sections: Implement sections for about, projects, skills, and contact information.

milestones.name: Milestone 4
milestones.description: Styling and Responsiveness: Apply Tailwind CSS styling and ensure mobile responsiveness.

milestones.name: Milestone 5
milestones.description: Additional Features and Deployment: Add animations, contact form, and deploy to Netlify.

title: Chat Application
summary: A real-time chat application with multiple rooms and user presence indicators.

milestones.name: Milestone 1
milestones.description: Project Initialisation and Setup: Set up React frontend and Node.js backend with Socket.io for real-time communication.

milestones.name: Milestone 2
milestones.description: Project Basic Structure and Layout: Create chat interface with message list, input field, and room selection.

milestones.name: Milestone 3
milestones.description: Real-time Messaging: Implement sending and receiving messages in real-time using Socket.io.

milestones.name: Milestone 4
milestones.description: Room Management: Add functionality to create and join chat rooms with user presence indicators.

milestones.name: Milestone 5
milestones.description: Additional Features and Deployment: Add message history, user authentication, and deploy the full-stack application.

title: Data Visualization Dashboard
summary: An interactive dashboard for visualizing complex datasets with charts and graphs.

milestones.name: Milestone 1
milestones.description: Project Initialisation and Setup: Set up React frontend, Flask backend, and integrate D3.js for visualizations.

milestones.name: Milestone 2
milestones.description: Project Basic Structure and Layout: Design the dashboard layout with chart containers and data filters.

milestones.name: Milestone 3
milestones.description: Data Processing: Implement backend API for data processing and aggregation.

milestones.name: Milestone 4
milestones.description: Chart Implementation: Create various chart types (bar, line, pie) using D3.js and integrate with React.

milestones.name: Milestone 5
milestones.description: Interactivity and Deployment: Add interactive features like filtering and drill-down, then deploy the application.
